ksa_text: Participate in the data governance council and stewardship community, representing the assigned domain's interests and escalating unresolved issues through established channels.

dcwf.top_element_label: Assess policy needs and collaborate with stakeholders to develop policies to govern cyber activities.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Governance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.43) to justify inclusion for the VP AI/ML. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world VP AI/ML roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Governance is not a standard competency expectation for VP AI/ML. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP AI/ML competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.43) and edge-domain placement (Data Governance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP AI/ML. All passes support exclusion.
